name: Sweet-Sour Kraut and Chops
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Baking potatoes, peeled and thinly sliced (4 cups)
1 can Sauerkraut, rinsed and drained (27 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12 x 7 1/2 x 2-inch baking dish, combine potato slices and onion.
2. Add 1/4 cup water.
3. Cover and bake at 350°F until nearly tender, for 45 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, in a skillet, brown pork chops on both sides in hot oil.
5. In a bowl, combine sauerkraut, undrained pineapple, and brown sugar.
6. Spoon the mixture over the potato mixture.
7. Place the chops atop the potatoes.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Cover and bake for 45 minutes longer.
